title: LA500 2026: Rob Rubano
description: Rob Rubano is the head of Cushman & Wakefield’s debt and structured finance platform for the U.S., as well as an executive vice chair in the firm’s Century City office. Rubano last year placed over $12 billion of debt across the U.S. Education: Bachelor’s degree and MBA, Anderson School of Business at University of California First job: ​​Working at a dry cleaner Favorite charity or cause: The U.S. Soccer Foundation Favorite book: “The River of Doubt” by Candice Millard Favorite pastime or hobby: ​​Soccer and golf Favorite restaurant for fun: Tower Bar at the Sunset Tower Hotel in West Hollywood Favorite restaurant for business: Il Pastaio in Beverly Hills Favorite quote: “You miss 100% of the shots you don’t take.” – Wanye Gretzky The post LA500 2026: Rob Rubano appeared first on Los Angeles Business Journal .

title: Điện Biên launches two major tourism projects
description: Two major projects – the Điện Biên Phủ Cultural Historical Tourism Cable Car Complex and the Northwest Urban Area, Resort Tourism and Sports Services Project – were officially launched during the the 2026 Điện Biên Investment Promotion Conference from May 10-11.

title: Ukraine opposes former German chancellor Schröder's candidacy as EU negotiator with Russia
description: Ukraine does not support the nomination of Germany's former chancellor Gerhard Schröder for the role of EU negotiator with Russia.

title: Laws, legal cases await paroled Thaksin
description: Compliance with laws and legal cases await former prime minister Thaksin Shinawatra, who was paroled on Monday, according to Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul.

title: Katsina approves N3.8bn loan to secure 3,890 Hajj slots
description: The Katsina State Government approved a N3.8 billion loan to secure 3,890 Hajj slots for intending pilgrims for the 2026 pilgrimage to Saudi Arabia. Read More: https://punchng.com/katsina-approves-n3-8bn-loan-to-secure-3890-hajj-slots/

title: Fasoranti a surviving pillar of wisdom, moral leadership – Ooni

title: Police arrest 12 suspected cultists in Edo
description: Edo State Police command has arrested 12 suspected cultists in Auchi who allegedly mobilised to launch attacks on rivals. Seven confessed to being members. Read More: https://punchng.com/police-arrest-12-suspected-cultists-in-edo/
